title: poa golestanensis
intro: Poa golestanensis, also known as Golestan Meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa golestanensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its leaves to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
